title: Select contact point and add message

blocks.content: Choose where notifications are sent and add context so responders understand the problem immediately.

In the **Configure notifications** section, select a contact point from the dropdown. Every Grafana Cloud stack has a default **grafana-default-email** contact point that sends to your account email. Select it or choose another contact point you've already configured.

blocks.targetvalue: Request duration exceeded threshold for Quick Pizza
blocks.content: In the **Configure notification message** section, set the **Summary** annotation. The summary appears at the top of every notification so responders know what happened without opening Grafana.

blocks.targetvalue: Check the Quick Pizza service for slow responses
blocks.content: Set the **Description** annotation. The description gives responders a next action and appears alongside the summary in the notification body.
Your notification settings are configured. Next, you'll save the rule and verify it's active.
